creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
Meld 1.2.1 is out: http://ftp.gnome.org/pub/gnome/sources/meld/1.2/
Many small fixes, added Git support, French translation, 4 new
localizations.

Fix: The following patch updates the port to 1.2.1.  I was tested it --
works for me like a charm.
How-To-Repeat: 
http://ftp.gnome.org/pub/gnome/sources/meld/1.2/
